title: A balancing act - An attempt to nurture economic recovery
section_path: A balancing act - An attempt to nurture economic recovery
section_path_text: A balancing act - An attempt to nurture economic recovery
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
One year ago this week, the U.S. Federal Reserve commanded global attention by cutting interest rates for the first time in more than four years, delivering a bold 50 basis point reduction that brought the federal funds target range down to 4.75-5.00 percent. At the time, the move was framed as a balancing act - an attempt to nurture economic recovery while inflation remained above target.
